description: Import the survey dataset from 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\colorado_survey_coded.csv'. Create three new CAD layers: 'V-TREE' (Green/index 3), 'V-FENCE' (Yellow/index 2), and 'V-ROAD' (Red/index 1). Organize the imported points by moving those with the code 'TREE' to the 'V-TREE' layer, 'FENCE' to the 'V-FENCE' layer, and 'ROAD' to the 'V-ROAD' layer. Leave all other points on the default layer. Export the resulting drawing as a DXF file to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\layered_delivery.dxf'.
